items.statcast_observation: Isaac Collins produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 106.8 mph at a 10.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the San Francisco Giants, KC 4, SF 3. Michael Wacha led the night, working 6.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 2 walks. Isaac Collins supplied the loudest Royals contact at 106.8 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Giants Recap
